privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.note: Replaces former Shopify boilerplate. Liquid template syntax removed; references to Shopify hosting removed; data-handling describes Merit's actual stack (PayPal, ShipStation, Render, Supabase, Resend) by category.

returns.title: Returns & refunds
returns.note: Replaces generic e-comm boilerplate. Specific to sealed sterile vials shipped from a 503B facility — no general change-of-mind returns, 7-day claim window for damaged/wrong/lost/defective.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.note: US-only, ships from Dallas 503B partner facility, ambient lyophilized stable, USPS/UPS, $100 free-shipping threshold.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.note: Replaces Shopify boilerplate. RUO posture made explicit. Governing law Texas. Practitioner Program clause, IP, limitation of liability, indemnification, dispute resolution.
